pack:review-depth: Flag test correctness issues at all severities: missing edge cases, tests that assert the wrong thing, tests that can never fail, tests that don't isolate the unit under test, and missing coverage for critical paths. Flag Critical/High production code findings as usual.
pack:scope-discipline: Write the failing test before writing implementation code. Do not expand implementation scope beyond what is needed to make the current failing test pass. Refactor only after the test is green.
pack:step-size: One failing test at a time. Red → Green → Refactor is a complete step. Do not write the next test until the current step is finished and committed or staged.
pack:reasoning-mode: Name the current TDD phase explicitly at the start of each step: Red (writing failing test), Green (minimal implementation to pass), or Refactor (restructuring without changing behavior). Show what the test asserts and why.
